auth_fields.help: Create at https://airtable.com/create/tokens with data.records:read scope (and write if needed).
auth_fields.label: Personal Access Token

connectors.description: Read and write Airtable bases, tables, and records.
connectors.name: Airtable

tools.description: List the bases the token can access.
tools.name: list_bases

tools.description: List tables and fields in a base.
tools.name: list_tables

tools.description: List records, with view and formula filters.
tools.name: list_records

tools.description: Fetch a single record by ID.
tools.name: get_record

tools.description: Create a record in a table.
tools.name: create_record

tools.description: Update fields on an existing record.
tools.name: update_record

auth_fields.help: e.g. https://bitbucket.corp.com
auth_fields.label: Bitbucket base URL

auth_fields.help: Recommended for Data Center 5.5+. Generate in Profile, Personal Access Tokens.
auth_fields.label: Personal Access Token

auth_fields.help: Use with password if you don't have a PAT.
auth_fields.label: Username

connectors.description: Browse self-hosted Bitbucket repositories, pull requests, and commits (Server / Data Center).
connectors.name: Bitbucket
connectors.notes: Set BITBUCKET_URL and either a token or username+password.

tools.description: List repos in a Bitbucket project.
tools.name: bitbucket_list_repos

tools.description: List a repo's pull requests.
tools.name: bitbucket_list_pull_requests

tools.description: List a repo's recent commits.
tools.name: bitbucket_get_commits

connectors.description: Read-only SQL access to a ClickHouse database over HTTP.
connectors.name: ClickHouse

tools.description: List databases / schemas on the server.
tools.name: list_databases

tools.description: List tables in a database.
tools.name: list_tables

tools.description: Show a table's columns and types.
tools.name: describe_table

tools.description: Run a read-only SQL query (guarded).
tools.name: run_query

tools.description: Show the engine and connection summary.
tools.name: server_info

auth_fields.help: e.g. https://wiki.corp.com
auth_fields.label: Confluence base URL

auth_fields.help: Recommended for Data Center 7.9+. Generate in Profile, Personal Access Tokens.
auth_fields.label: Personal Access Token

auth_fields.help: Use with password if you don't have a PAT.
auth_fields.label: Username

connectors.description: Search and read self-hosted Confluence pages (Data Center / Server).
connectors.name: Confluence
connectors.notes: Set CONFLUENCE_URL and either a token or username+password.

tools.description: Search Confluence pages with CQL.
tools.name: confluence_search

tools.description: Read a Confluence page by ID.
tools.name: confluence_get_page

tools.description: List accessible Confluence spaces.
tools.name: confluence_list_spaces

auth_fields.help: e.g. https://your-es-host:9200
auth_fields.label: Elasticsearch base URL

connectors.description: Search self-hosted Elasticsearch or OpenSearch indices and read mappings (and index documents in Writer mode).
connectors.name: Elasticsearch
connectors.notes: Set ES_URL. Credentials (ES_USER, ES_PASSWORD) are optional for unauthenticated clusters. The write tool (index document) requires Writer mode via ES_MODE.

tools.description: List indices in the cluster.
tools.name: es_list_indices

tools.description: Get the field mapping for an index.
tools.name: es_get_mapping

tools.description: Search an index with an optional Lucene query string.
tools.name: es_search

tools.description: Index a JSON document into an index.
tools.name: es_index_document

auth_fields.help: Your GitHub Enterprise API URL, e.g. https://github.company.com/api/v3
auth_fields.label: GitHub API URL

auth_fields.help: Personal Access Token with repo or read-only scope
auth_fields.label: Personal Access Token

connectors.description: Search and read self-hosted GitHub repositories, issues, and pull requests (and create issues/comments in Writer mode).
connectors.name: GitHub
connectors.notes: Set GITHUB_URL and GITHUB_TOKEN. Write tools (create issue, comment) require Writer mode via GITHUB_MODE.

tools.description: Search GitHub repositories by name or metadata.
tools.name: github_search_repos

tools.description: List issues in a GitHub repository.
tools.name: github_list_issues

tools.description: Read a GitHub issue by its number.
tools.name: github_get_issue

tools.description: List pull requests in a GitHub repository.
tools.name: github_list_pull_requests

tools.description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository.
tools.name: github_create_issue

tools.description: Add a comment to a GitHub issue.
tools.name: github_comment_issue

auth_fields.help: e.g. https://gitlab.corp.com

auth_fields.help: Personal Access Token with api or read_api scope
auth_fields.label: Personal Access Token

connectors.description: Search and read self-hosted GitLab projects, issues, and merge requests (and create issues/comments in Writer mode).

connectors.notes: Set GITLAB_URL and GITLAB_TOKEN. Write tools (create issue, comment) require Writer mode via GITLAB_MODE.

tools.description: Create a new issue in a GitLab project.

tools.description: Add a comment to a GitLab issue.
